dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8003 IH: Expanding the Fast Track Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Deluzio (for himself and Mr. Crank) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend title XLI of the FAST Act to lower the cost estimate threshold relating to eligibility of infrastructure projects for certain permitting processes, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Expanding the Fast Track Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Section 41001(6)(A)(i)(II) of the FAST Act (42 U.S.C. 4370m note) is amended by striking $200,000,000 and inserting $50,000,000.
Section 41003(f)(1)(A) of the FAST Act (42 U.S.C. 4370m–2) is amended by striking $200,000,000 and inserting $50,000,000.
This Act shall take effect on January 1, 2027, or on the date of enactment, whichever is later.
